displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament to change the appearance of The Dragon's Shadow. Once you get an ornament, it's unlocked for all characters on your account.

displayProperties.name: Achronal Antedate
displayProperties.description: Equip this tier 5 weapon ornament to change the appearance of Antedate. Once you get an ornament, it's unlocked for all characters on your account.

displayProperties.name: Destabilizing Rounds Refit
displayProperties.description: Defeating a target creates a Void burst; hitting other targets with this burst makes them volatile and grants you Volatile Rounds for a short duration.

displayProperties.name: Extended Barrel
displayProperties.description:
Weighty barrel extension.
  •  Increases range
  •  Decreases handling speed
  •  Moderately controls recoil

displayProperties.name: Psyceratops Bond
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Vernier Thrusters
displayProperties.description: Improved lateral boosting, enabling you to better dodge enemy attacks.

displayProperties.name: Solstice Vest (Majestic)
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Upgrade Armor
displayProperties.description: Upgrade this armor to improve its 3 lowest stats by 1, up to a maximum of 5 in each when upgraded to a Masterwork.

displayProperties.name: Lightguard Gauntlets
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Light Battery
displayProperties.description:
Lightweight, agile battery.
  •  Increases handling speed
  •  Increases reload speed

displayProperties.name: Mykel's Reverence
displayProperties.description: Equip this tier 5 weapon ornament to change the appearance of this weapon.

displayProperties.name: Taken Predator
displayProperties.description: Bonus damage against Taken enemies and Gambit invaders.

displayProperties.name: Luxe Visor
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.
